title: Fixture account parity — wallet unlocks with named SRP/private-key accounts

read-accounts.expression: (async function(){var metamask=(stateHooks.store.getState()||{}).metamask||{};var accts=metamask.internalAccounts||{};var byId=accts.accounts||{};var list=Object.keys(byId).map(function(id){var acct=byId[id]||{};var meta=acct.metadata||{};return {id:id,name:meta.name||'',address:acct.address||'',keyringType:(meta.keyring||{}).type||'',type:acct.type||''};});return JSON.stringify({accountCount:list.length,names:list.map(function(account){return account.name;}),keyringTypes:list.map(function(account){return account.keyringType;}),privateKeyCount:list.filter(function(account){return account.keyringType==='Simple Key Pair';}).length,mnemonicCount:list.filter(function(account){return account.keyringType==='HD Key Tree';}).length,selectedAccountId:accts.selectedAccount||null,accounts:list});})()
